_obsolete_reason: Group-MMS routing was retired in Phase 2 of the 1:1 SMS pivot. Rewrite required for Phase 7.
description: 95 edge case test scenarios for Rally SMS Agent

cases.title: Destination buried in full sentence
cases.input: I mean honestly Tulum would be sick but idk
cases.expected: Rally extracts 'Tulum' as a destination candidate via ConversationParser

cases.title: Simultaneous messages (200ms apart)
cases.expected: Both messages processed, no race condition on session state

cases.title: Voice memo (MMS audio)
cases.input: MMS with NumMedia=1, no Body text, MediaContentType=audio/amr
cases.expected: Rally acknowledges: 'Got the audio! If you've got destination ideas, just text them.'

cases.title: Emoji-only message
cases.expected: Pre-filter skips ConversationParser. No response during passive phases.

cases.title: Image with no caption
cases.expected: Rally: 'Got the image! If you've booked your flights, just reply YES.'

cases.title: Link with no text
cases.expected: Rally detects Airbnb URL, stores as wishlist_url on session

cases.title: Profanity mid-conversation
cases.input: this shit is taking forever can we just pick tulum
cases.expected: Rally ignores profanity, extracts destination preference 'Tulum'

cases.title: Non-English language
cases.input: Yo quiero ir a Cancún, me encanta la playa
cases.expected: ConversationParser (Haiku) extracts 'Cancún' regardless of language

cases.title: 1000+ character wall of text
cases.input: So I've been thinking about this trip and honestly I think we should consider a few options. First, there's Tulum which is great for beach vibes and cenotes...[continues for 1000+ chars]
cases.expected: ConversationParser processes it. Message not pre-filtered (>3 words). Haiku extracts decisions.

cases.title: Command typo
cases.expected: Not matched as keyword. Falls through to phase handler. Ideally fuzzy-matched to STATUS.

cases.title: Number during non-vote phase
cases.expected: Pre-filter catches single digit, skips ConversationParser. No response if no poll open.

cases.title: Threaded reply (quote reply)
cases.input: Standard MMS — Twilio delivers threaded replies as normal messages. No special handling needed.
cases.expected: Processed normally. Twilio strips threading context.

cases.title: Planner sends dest+dates+budget in one message
cases.input: Jake — Tulum, Nov 8-12, around $1250pp flights + Airbnb
cases.expected: ConversationParser extracts all three. Pre-fills TripSession. Skips polls for resolved fields.

cases.title: Duplicate message within 5 seconds
cases.expected: Idempotency check on thread_messages.message_sid. Second request returns 200 immediately.

cases.title: Ambiguous destination — Paris
cases.expected: Rally stores 'Paris' as candidate. Does not disambiguate (France vs Texas) unless group discusses.

cases.title: Vote out of range
cases.expected: matchVoteToOption returns null. Message falls through. No vote recorded.

cases.title: Case sensitivity — yes vs YES
cases.expected: Commit handler uppercases before matching. Both 'yes' and 'YES' work.

cases.title: Command mid-thread from planner
cases.input: PAUSE (sent while others are actively chatting)
cases.expected: Keyword detected first, before phase routing. Session paused immediately.

cases.title: 7 of 8 respond, 1 silent
cases.expected: NudgeScheduler sends 24h nudge naming the silent participant. At 48h, marks non_responsive and proceeds.
cases.resolution: HANDLED. For poll phases, NudgeScheduler handles 24h/48h nudges + auto-close. For non-poll collection phases (INTRO, COLLECTING_ORIGINS, AWAITING_FLIGHTS), no timeout yet. TODO added in checkAutoAdvance for future 48h auto-close.

cases.title: Tied vote 4-4
cases.expected: resolveWinner() does Math.random() coin flip. Announces: 'It's a tie — flipping a coin... X wins.'

cases.title: 8 unique destinations from 8 people
cases.expected: ConversationParser consolidates to top 4 by frequency. If all unique, Rally presents all (up to 4) for vote.
cases.resolution: FIXED. advanceToDestinationVote now caps candidates at 4, sorted by votes (most mentions first).

cases.title: Planner drops out silently
cases.expected: 7-day momentum check fires. After 60 days, session marked at-risk. 90-day timeout → ABANDONED.
cases.resolution: HANDLED. Momentum check at 7 days (NudgeScheduler) detects stale sessions. No additional code needed.

cases.title: Non-planner tries planner command
cases.expected: Rally responds: 'Only [PlannerName] can do that.' Does not execute.

cases.title: New person added mid-session with catch-up
cases.expected: Merge path adds them to session. Name extracted if they send 'Name - Dest'. No re-run of completed phases.
cases.resolution: FIXED. sms-inbound merge path now sends catch-up message if session is past INTRO: summarizes destination, dates, and current phase.

cases.title: Someone leaves mid-session
cases.expected: Twilio delivery failure detection (30003/30005). After 3 consecutive failures, session checks with planner.
cases.resolution: HANDLED. TwilioSender zombie detection: 3 consecutive delivery failures marks participant as unreachable. No additional code needed.

cases.title: Everyone sends STOP
cases.expected: All participants marked opted_out. Rally stops sending. Session effectively dead but not formally CANCELLED.

cases.title: Commit poll: exactly half commit
cases.expected: Session SPLIT. New thread created with 4 committed members. Original thread closed.

cases.title: Vote change after submitting
cases.expected: recordVote() updates existing response. Latest vote wins.

cases.title: Two people claim planner
cases.input: Person A sends 'PLANNER Me', Person B sends 'PLANNER Me'
cases.expected: Only current planner can use PLANNER command. Second person gets 'Only X can do that.'

cases.title: Massive budget spread $400 vs $4000
cases.expected: analyzeBudget() detects spread ratio >2.0. budget_status = 'DISPUTED'. Rally prompts group discussion.

cases.title: Group argues in thread
cases.expected: Rally listens passively via ConversationParser. Does not interject during free discussion. No response unless keyword used.
cases.resolution: HANDLED. Rally only responds to keywords and during active polls. During free discussion between phases, routeMessage returns null (no response). No additional code needed.

cases.title: Someone tells Rally to stop — 'shut up'
cases.expected: Not a keyword match. Falls through to phase handler. Rally does not respond to non-keyword messages in passive phases.

cases.title: All 8 suggest same destination
cases.expected: Only 1 candidate. advanceToDestinationVote() skips poll: 'Only one destination — X it is!'
cases.resolution: VERIFIED. advanceToDestinationVote checks candidates.length === 1 and locks it in directly, skipping the poll. Duplicate destinations are deduplicated during INTRO (alreadyListed check).

cases.title: Sub-group booking inside larger thread
cases.input: just me and Jake for this one
cases.expected: Rally doesn't support sub-groups in MVP. Entire committed list is used for splits.
cases.resolution: FIXED. message-router detects sub-group patterns ('just me and [name]', 'only N of us') and responds: 'I can only split for the whole group — you and [name] can sort that one between yourselves.'

cases.title: Rally re-added to previously CANCELLED session
cases.expected: New session created (old one is CANCELLED, not matched by lookup). Fresh start.
cases.resolution: HANDLED. Session lookup in sms-inbound filters by status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PAUSED', 'RE_ENGAGEMENT_PENDING', 'FIRST_BOOKING_REACHED'). CANCELLED sessions are never found, so a new session is created automatically.

cases.title: Minor in group
cases.expected: Rally has no age verification. All participants treated equally. No age-restricted content in trip planning.

cases.title: Repetitive opener across sessions
cases.expected: BotResponseGenerator uses Claude Sonnet, generates fresh each time. Should vary naturally.

cases.title: Are you a bot?
cases.expected: Rally should respond honestly but on-brand: 'I'm Rally — part bot, part trip-planning legend.'

cases.title: Casual conversation with Rally
cases.input: how are you? what's your favorite beach?
cases.expected: Rally deflects gracefully: 'I'm great when groups are booking trips! Let's focus on yours.'

cases.title: Grieving participant
cases.expected: Rally has no sentiment detection. Continues normally. Edge case for future emotional intelligence.

cases.title: Enthusiastic participant
cases.expected: Tone profiling in BotResponseGenerator detects high energy. Celebration messages match.

cases.title: Back-to-back Rally messages within 30s
cases.expected: Active conversation check in PRD: hold proactive messages if 3+ messages in 5 min. Not yet implemented.

cases.title: Name collision — two Jakes
cases.expected: Both stored with same display_name. Rally uses phone suffix for disambiguation if needed.

cases.title: Unusual name spelling
cases.expected: Regex captures first word before dash. Stores 'Siobhán' correctly (Unicode-safe).

cases.title: Rally message too long
cases.expected: Most messages under 300 chars by design. Auto-chained messages can be longer. MMS limit is 1600 chars.

cases.title: Participant calls out confusing message
cases.expected: Falls through to ConversationParser. If in active phase, no response. Could add HELP-like handling.

cases.title: Rally refers to someone who left
cases.expected: STATUS checks participant.status. Opted-out participants excluded from status summary.

cases.title: Group inside joke or nickname
cases.expected: Rally doesn't detect or use nicknames. Uses stored display_name only.

cases.title: Flight price update at 3am
cases.expected: NudgeScheduler runs on UTC cron. No timezone-aware quiet hours implemented yet.

cases.title: Premature celebration — 2 of 8 booked
cases.expected: Social proof fires per-participant: 'X's flights are locked in.' Not a group celebration.

cases.title: 23 hours silent — just under nudge threshold
cases.expected: No nudge fires. Poll nudge threshold is 24h from poll open, not from last message.

cases.title: Multiple nudge jobs fire simultaneously
cases.expected: scheduled_actions processed sequentially. Each action checks phase_sub_state before executing (idempotent).

cases.title: Nudge fires during PAUSE
cases.expected: PAUSE cancels all pending scheduled_actions. NudgeScheduler queries filter paused=false.

cases.title: RESUME same second as scheduled nudge
cases.expected: Race condition possible. Nudge checks session.paused before sending. RESUME resets nudge schedule.

cases.title: Trip in 3 days — no urgency in tone
cases.expected: No urgency detection implemented. Rally treats all trips equally regardless of proximity.

cases.title: Trip dates already passed
cases.expected: RESUME handler checks dates.start < now(). Asks planner for new dates or RESET.

cases.title: Vote closes with 3 of 8 missing
cases.expected: 48h nudge marks non-responders as non_responsive. Poll resolves with available votes.

cases.title: Books flight right after 'wait' advice
cases.expected: BOOKED keyword always accepted. No conflict with price advice. Rally acknowledges booking.

cases.title: Nudge on public holiday
cases.expected: No holiday awareness. Cron fires regardless. Future enhancement.

cases.title: Session PAUSED for 6 months
cases.expected: Paused sessions don't timeout. RESUME checks if dates passed. Session fully recoverable.

cases.title: Two sessions for same thread_id
cases.expected: thread_id has UNIQUE constraint. Second insert fails. Lookup returns existing session.

cases.title: Zero destinations suggested
cases.expected: advanceToDestinationVote returns 'No destinations suggested yet — drop your ideas!'

cases.title: Weekly flight check 4 days before trip
cases.expected: NudgeScheduler Job 3 fires regardless. Message is still useful ('book now').

cases.title: PROPOSE with no amount
cases.expected: Parse fails. Rally responds: 'Usage: PROPOSE $[amount] [reason]'

cases.title: PROPOSE $50,000
cases.expected: No upper bound check. Rally distributes normally. Group votes decide.

cases.title: Proposer goes silent after confirmation
cases.expected: NudgeScheduler Job 6: 24h nudge to proposer. After 48h (pay_by), auto-cancel.

cases.title: Two simultaneous PROPOSE requests
cases.expected: Queued commands: second PROPOSE queued until first resolves. 'There's an open vote right now.'

cases.title: SPLIT before lodging booked
cases.expected: SPLIT works anytime — it's for any group expense, not just lodging.

cases.title: PAID sent by non-proposer
cases.expected: handleProposePaid checks proposer_user_id. Non-match returns null (no action).

cases.title: PROPOSE YES from opted-out participant
cases.expected: Opted-out participants excluded from PROPOSE distribution and threshold calculation.

cases.title: PROPOSE threshold unreachable (5 needed, 3 in thread)
cases.expected: 80% threshold applied to actual committed count. 3 people → need 3 (ceil(3*0.8)=3).

cases.title: PROPOSE during wrong phase
cases.expected: PROPOSE is a keyword command — works in any phase. Queued if a collection flow is open.

cases.title: Odd number split — $307 / 8 people
cases.expected: calculateSplit rounds to 2 decimals. Penny discrepancy added to first participant.

cases.title: CANCEL after PAID
cases.expected: PROPOSE status is 'paid'. CANCEL after PAID has no handler — could add refund messaging.

cases.title: PROPOSE with URL pasted in
cases.expected: Regex captures amount and reason (including URL). URL stored in reason string.

cases.title: Claude API returns 500
cases.expected: BotResponseGenerator has graceful degradation. Sends templated fallback: 'Got it — give me a moment.'

cases.title: Gemini returns malformed JSON
cases.expected: parseGeminiJson strips markdown fences. On parse failure, retries once. Then marks as 'unavailable'.

cases.title: Duplicate Twilio webhook delivery
cases.expected: Idempotency check on thread_messages.message_sid (UNIQUE). Second delivery returns 200 immediately.

cases.title: Twilio rate limit — 20+ pending outbound
cases.expected: outbound_message_queue with priority ordering. Processes at 1 msg/sec. Lower priority messages wait.

cases.title: Supabase connection drops mid-transaction
cases.expected: Optimistic locking on trip_sessions.version. Failed writes detected on next attempt. Partial state possible.

cases.title: Claude context window exceeded
cases.expected: serializeForPrompt keeps context under 2000 tokens. ConversationParser caps at 30 messages.

cases.title: Gemini returns 'no flights found'
cases.expected: CostEstimator returns null. Fallback: 'Couldn't pull live prices — check Google Flights.'

cases.title: Webhook takes 10+ seconds, Twilio retries
cases.expected: Retry creates second webhook. Idempotency check catches duplicate MessageSid.

cases.title: TripWebView token expires mid-session
cases.expected: Server returns 'This link has expired — text STATUS to get a fresh one.'

cases.title: Outbound delivery failure (carrier error)
cases.expected: TwilioSender tracks consecutive_failures. After 3 within 48h, session marked ABANDONED.

cases.title: Claude returns 'As an AI...'
cases.expected: No stripping implemented. BotResponseGenerator persona prompt instructs against this but doesn't enforce.

cases.title: Two simultaneous webhooks for same session
cases.expected: Optimistic locking on trip_sessions.version prevents concurrent writes. One succeeds, one retries.

cases.title: Re-engagement after bad trip
cases.expected: No sentiment detection. Re-engagement fires based on dates only. One message, no follow-up.

cases.title: YES from phone not in original session
cases.expected: MessageRouter checks RE_ENGAGEMENT_PENDING status. Any reply triggers new session with all original participants.

cases.title: Re-engagement for trip that never happened
cases.expected: PRD: trip_likely_cancelled flag suppresses re-engagement if pre-departure message got no response.

cases.title: Multiple YES replies to re-engagement
cases.expected: First YES creates new session. Subsequent YES messages route to the new active session.

cases.title: YES then CANCEL for re-engagement
cases.expected: YES creates new session. CANCEL (if planner) sets new session to CANCELLED.

cases.title: Original thread no longer exists
cases.expected: Twilio delivery failure. TwilioSender detects consecutive failures → session ABANDONED.

cases.title: Re-engagement references wrong destination
cases.expected: Message uses session.destination which is the confirmed destination. If null, uses 'that trip'.

cases.title: Third session via re-engagement
cases.expected: New TripSession created normally. parent chain: session3 ← session2 ← session1 (via parent_session_id).
